name: Leather crossbody bag
description:
Hermès’ Green Chèvre Clic 16 Crossbody delivers sleek structure and vibrant color in a perfectly compact silhouette! Crafted from goatskin leather with gold hardware, this petite piece features a detachable strap with a 21.75-inch drop, allowing it to transition effortlessly from crossbody to clutch. The flap secures with a slide clasp, opening to a thoughtfully organized interior lined in tonal leather with two large slide pockets and four smaller slides. Brand new and stamped with a D, it comes with a box. This is a smart, stylish companion that proves great design is all about the details!
 



Product ID:
HR.Z0324.08


Measurements/Size:
6.5"W x 5.5"H x 1"D
